suite.name: Convites

test.name: CT01 — Emissão de Convite com Sucesso

kw.name: Abrir Tela De Cadastro De Convite
Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'http://localhost:3000/convites/novo # Ajuste para a URL local do projeto'.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.doc: Testa a criação de um convite válido com saldo disponível.
test.status: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.216) Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x00000001011a4c40 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3221216 1 chromedriver 0x000000010119cb1c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3188156 2 chromedriver 0x0000000100c5f8f4 _RNvCsiKAbIcglKMQ_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75152 3 chromedriver 0x0000000100c5799c _RNvCsiKAbIcglKMQ_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 42552 4 chromedriver 0x0000000100c4a140 cxxbridge1$string$len + 5152 5 chromedriver 0x0000000100c4bc44 cxxbridge1$string$len + 12068 6 chromedriver 0x0000000100c4a5a8 cxxbridge1$string$len + 6280 7 chromedriver 0x0000000100c49d54 cxxbridge1$string$len + 4148 8 chromedriver 0x0000000100c49a80 cxxbridge1$strin... test.name: CT02 — Bloqueio por Falta de Saldo

kw.name: Abrir Tela De Cadastro De Convite
Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'http://localhost:3000/convites/novo # Ajuste para a URL local do projeto'.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.arg: limite máximo de convites deste mês

test.doc: Testa o bloqueio quando o usuário não possui mais saldo de convites.
test.status: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.216) Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x0000000102e14c40 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3221216 1 chromedriver 0x0000000102e0cb1c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3188156 2 chromedriver 0x00000001028cf8f4 _RNvCsiKAbIcglKMQ_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75152 3 chromedriver 0x00000001028c799c _RNvCsiKAbIcglKMQ_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 42552 4 chromedriver 0x00000001028ba140 cxxbridge1$string$len + 5152 5 chromedriver 0x00000001028bbc44 cxxbridge1$string$len + 12068 6 chromedriver 0x00000001028ba5a8 cxxbridge1$string$len + 6280 7 chromedriver 0x00000001028b9d54 cxxbridge1$string$len + 4148 8 chromedriver 0x00000001028b9a80 cxxbridge1$strin... test.name: CT03 — Bloqueio por Data no Passado

kw.name: Abrir Tela De Cadastro De Convite
Open Browser

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.arg: Não é possível emitir convites para datas passadas

test.doc: Testa a validação de erro ao inserir uma data retroativa.
test.status: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.216) Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x0000000104734c40 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3221216 1 chromedriver 0x000000010472cb1c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3188156 2 chromedriver 0x00000001041ef8f4 _RNvCsiKAbIcglKMQ_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75152 3 chromedriver 0x00000001041e799c _RNvCsiKAbIcglKMQ_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 42552 4 chromedriver 0x00000001041da140 cxxbridge1$string$len + 5152 5 chromedriver 0x00000001041dbc44 cxxbridge1$string$len + 12068 6 chromedriver 0x00000001041da5a8 cxxbridge1$string$len + 6280 7 chromedriver 0x00000001041d9d54 cxxbridge1$string$len + 4148 8 chromedriver 0x00000001041d9a80 cxxbridge1$strin... suite.doc: Suite de Testes de UI: Emissão de Novos Convites
